_publications._publicationTitle: Ex vivo to in vivo model of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for precision oncology.

_contextSnippet: phospho-ERK levels were assessed via immunofluorescence...*** indicates P < 0.001. **** indicates P < 0.0001
details: Successfully used to assess phospho-ERK levels via immunofluorescence in microtissues exposed to MEK inhibitors, showing significant reduction with mirdametinib (P < 0.001) and selumetinib (P < 0.0001)
